final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering style are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout: top band (主标题 + 副标题 + 导语), left column (结构拆解区 with 引线标注 and 局部特写), upper-right (材质 / 工艺 / 质感区 with texture swatches), mid-right (纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区 with 主色板 + 纹样样本 + 文化解释), bottom band (穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结); central subject is a full-body standing figure in authentic 少数民族 dress if figure-appropriate
Subject: must include a carefully chosen 中国少数民族 (auto-selected for visual richness and structural complexity), depicted in authentic full-body standing pose as central subject, with all key garment components structurally labeled
Scene/backdrop: must use a 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 paper-texture background — exact tone and grain are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, archival, museum-display atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must reflect the authentic color system of the chosen 少数民族服饰; overall palette restrained and scholarly — exact balance is yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic texture swatches for key fabrics and surface treatments (刺绣 / 织锦 / 蜡染 / 银饰 etc. as appropriate); exact material selection based on chosen subject is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all in-image text in 简体中文 — including 主标题, 副标题, 导语, all 引线标注 labels, 材质说明, 纹样寓意解释, 色彩含义说明, 穿着顺序步骤, 核心特征总结; no English, no pinyin, no romanization anywhere
Constraints: must preserve structural accuracy of the chosen 少数民族服饰 system; all 引线标注 must connect to correct garment parts; 纹样 and 色彩 explanations must reflect authentic cultural meaning; layout must read as a complete, self-contained 文博专题信息图; all Chinese characters must be legible, correctly formed, and cleanly rendered
Avoid: 海报感, 影楼感, 电商感, 动漫感, cosplay感, over-decoration, misaligned annotation lines, structurally incorrect garment parts, blurry or garbled characters, fake or generic textures, English text, pinyin
